message:
feat(search): Add daemon client module for warm embedder/reranker

Introduces daemon_client.rs with infrastructure for keeping embedder
and reranker models warm via a background daemon process:

- DaemonClient trait abstracting daemon protocol
- DaemonRetryConfig for configurable retry + jittered backoff
- Fallback wrappers that gracefully degrade to local computation
- Atomic counters for daemon/fallback usage metrics
- Structured logging for observability

This is preparation for bd-1lps which will provide a Unix socket
daemon for embedding/reranking, avoiding cold-start latency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
